reviews.title: High quality replacement for Das
reviews.text: I purchased these for my Das Keyboard Model S (Mac). All of the keys fit, including the spacebar, and they are much higher quality than the Das OEM keys. They feel more substantial, and the sound of the keyboard is a little different, the clacking is lower pitched.

reviews.title: Really good keycaps, using on my custom mech.
reviews.text: I would give 5 stars, but one of the keys came broken from shipping. Luckily I bought for a 60key, so I didn't need that specific one.

reviews.title: great looking keycaps
reviews.text: great looking key caps surprisingly  easy to type on blank keyboard

reviews.title: doesnt work correctly for gmmk tkl
reviews.text: bought these to replace the stabilizers in my gmmk tk; board ... for some reason they just dont work.  they dont correctly click in and if you put a keycap on it and take the keycap off it pulls the whole thing with it. ended up just using the gold bars and white switch part with the other stuff from my gmmk.  its better than stock at least.

reviews.title: Everglides and they are nice
reviews.text: very nice Stabilizers,  just needsa touch of lube and they are good to go

reviews.title: Cure clicky stabs
reviews.text:
Since you always gotta replace PCB manufacturer stabs, you might as well buy these. Great quality. Highly recommend full Holee mod for the best feel. Always lube your stabs folks.
highly recommend.

reviews.title: Improvement on V1
reviews.text: I have used the first version of these and they work good, but have had issues with the stabilizer wires popping out when removing keycaps.  These updated V2 have extra hook to keep the wire in place and work nicely.  These are some of the best stabilizers you can get right now.

reviews.title: I should have gotten these a while ago...
reviews.text:
I have an NK87 and the stabilizer ticking was terrible. I did all the tricks for it, but it persisted from some keys. NK sells their stabilizers for about the same price as these, so I thought I would just have to live with it. Then I just decided to get these, and am so glad I did. Ticking is gone.

Key points
1. They look extremely similar to the NKs, but there is obviously some difference.
2. Straight and flat wires - no tuning needed
3. Manufactured right - i.e. no need to clip, stems are flat
4. Came with the soulmate tuning kit. I think this helped a lot too.

Highly recommended.

title: GTSP 9009 XDA Retro PBT Keycaps Set for Gaming Keyboard Dye-Sub for Cherry Mx Gateron Kailh Switch GK61/GK68 60% Mechanical Keyboard (9009-XDA)
features: ✅【What You Get】-1x133 thick PBT Keycap set. It’s only keycaps, no keyboard included
✅ 【Widely Compatible】-9009 keycaps with 6.25U spacebar can fit for 61/87/104/108/84/68 mechanical keyboard
✅【XDA Profile Keycaps】-The XDA keycap has a larger surface contact, and the touch area of the finger is also larger. The uniform profile which is perfect for ortho linear ergonomic
✅ 【PBT & DYE SUBLIMATION】-Compared with ABS, PBT has better high hardness, wear resistance and high temperature resistance. Dye Sublimation makes the font of keycaps clear and non-fade
✅ 【Switch Compatibility】-Standardized MX compatible with most MX switches. e.g. Cherry MX switches and clones including Gateron, Halo, and Kaihua

reviews.title: Space bar was too big:( still cute tho
reviews.text: The keys are so cute! I love it! The only downside was that the space bar was too big for my keyboard!! It was also too big on my brothers keyboard, so that’s a little weird. So sad about it too since that was the main reason why I got it:(

reviews.title: Really cheap look and feel
reviews.text:
These are really cheap. I know you might be thinking, you get what you pay for and these are cheaply priced. However, at the end of the day, keycaps are just plastic and the good ones are just waaay over priced.

First thing first, the actual color differs from the picture. The picture has a nice looking matcha green, the actual product is a little darker green and no where as vibrant. Also, some of the legends on the keycaps are kind of blurry. I am noticing the blurriness on all the non-alpha caps. You can tell these are really cheap and they look pretty bad.

title: CUSTOMIZATIONS Coiled USB c Cable, Customized Gaming Mechanical Keyboard Cable, Handwork Braided + PET mesh, Metal Plug, with Detachable Metal Aviator Connector (Black White)
features: [Multiple color options] CUSTOMIZATIONS coiled keyboard cable has various eye-catching color settings, which can provide more interesting elements for your desktop settings.

[keyboard Coiled cables, durable quality]: This custom coiled cable uses four high-quality copper wires and aluminum shielding foil as the core. The material is not afraid of bending or breaking. The weaving adopts woven mesh + PET mesh double-layer weaving, and the resin mesh is both beautiful and durable.

[Metal aviator connector]: The metal cannon connector allows you to quickly connect different cables to the keyboard or other accessories. The pure copper is chrome-plated, the copper needle and the copper core are plated with 24K gold wire, and the shell adopts electroplating technology to achieve a bright texture, highlighting high-end and texture.

[Coiled USB C Cable, USB 2.0 compatible] The cable adopts Type-C interface design, aluminum alloy CNC shell, sandblasted surface, corrosion and oxidation resistance, and recessed design can match most keyboards.

[Excellent quality]: This Coiled Cable has experienced multiple technical tests, including data transmission stability, Cable is firm and durable, and the joint welding is firm. Each product you have got is high quality.

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: This USB C cable works great! It's appears to be high quality material and I really like the coiled style. Very impressed!

title: Glorious Aura V2 (Black) - PBT Pudding Keycaps for Mechanical Keyboards - ANSI (US), ISO Compatible - Supports Full Size, TKL, 75%, 60% Layouts
features: ✅Glorious Aura Keycaps V2 : This redesigned 145 key pudding keycap layout is compatible with GMMK Regular/PRO and most keyboard sets
✅Comes in black or white colors
✅Standard OEM Profile: Glorious Aura Pudding Keycap Set features a standard OEM profile that is widely used over many mechanical keyboards

✅Thick, High-Quality PBT Plastic Keys : Glorious Aura Pudding Keycaps are made with quality material that is resistant to wear, friction, and solvents

reviews.title: Best keycaps I have ever used.
reviews.text:
Bought these for my GMMK pro.

I have owned several mechanical keyboards, but never bought a high-end set of keycaps. Unlike every other set I've ever used, these just seem to ignore dirt and grease. I can stuff my face with a big Mac and go straight to typing, and the caps stay completely clean. I don't know how that works but I won't question it.

Other keyboards require weekly wipe downs, I have never had to do it with these caps.

They're also noticeably built well. These are going to outlast my fingers by a hundred years, likely.

reviews.title: Legend doesn’t glow like other pics
reviews.text: For my Tofu65, I do like these pudding key caps, but I’m not sure why the legends on my key caps aren’t transparent. Everyone who posted reviews with pics show their legends glowing, so I’m not sure why mine are different. My other issue is I got several duplicative keys, and I’m missing a few. For example, I only have one home key and about 4 page down keys. So that’s slightly annoying. I’ve seen some others complain about this similar thing as well. But the feel and look of these key caps are quality. Slightly disappointed.

reviews.title: Great caps work as advertised
reviews.text: Works great

reviews.title: Perfect

title: Akko Keycaps Top Printed Shine-Through with ASA Profile, White Keycaps PBT Double-Shot Keycaps for Mechanical Keyboards
features: SHINE-THROUGH KEYCAPS – Deliver premium and shining RGB experiences with Akko ASA Shine-through keycap sets! Come with extremely durable and resistant double-shot Shine-through keycaps, the legend shine through keycaps brings unique and great RGB effects.

ULTIMATE CUSTOMIZATION FLEXIBILITY – Comes with Akko ASA profile, the keycap set is suitable for a variety of layouts including 61-key(60%), 64-key, 68-key (65%), 84-key (75%), 87-key (TKL), 98-Key (Classic 1800), 100-Key (96%), Alice and full 108-key size, and thus offers strong flexibility for keyboard personalization.

ASA PROFILE – Akko’s proprietary ASA profile is tailored to offer a more familiar and comfortable typing experience by matching the height for OEM profile while maintaining the aesthetics and spheric top of the classic SA profile.
PBT DOUBLE-SHOT – Double-shot keycaps are extremely durable and resistant to wear even for decades, and the legends are particularly vibrant, sharp with high contrast.

FOR MX STRUCTURE SWITCHES – Compatible with MX structure mechanical switches and mainstream keyboards including but not limited to Cherry, Gateron, Akko and Kailh. Large keys of non-standard layout & stabilizers may not be compatible.

reviews.title: Not the brightest shine-through, but for the material and price it's worth it.
reviews.text:
Akko's ASA profile is a taller profile kind of like SA. Feels great to type on and is fine for gaming if you don't mind the extra travel time on each keystroke. The finish on these has a great texture and it's PBT so it shouldn't wear out quickly. "Shouldn't" being relative since I tend to shred keycaps as though my fingers were first dipped in acid before typing.

30.00 for keycaps of this quality and for the number of keys is great especially in a hobby where everything is over priced, over hyped, and overly bogged down in group buys and pre-orders that take literal years to fulfill.

reviews.title: Shine-Through keycaps, look amazing
reviews.text: These shine-through keycaps look awesome.  They are super easy to install, like most keycaps.  It is just a bit time consuming.  I love being able to change out keys and switches and seem to collect keycaps.  These are great and sound and feel amazing.

title: Happy Balls 60% Keycaps Side Printed PBT Keycap Set 60 Percent OEM Profile Thick Cherry MX Key Caps with Key Puller for US-ANSI Layout 61 68 60% MX Switches Mechanical Keyboard(Black Gray Combo)
description:
Note:
This is only keycaps, no keyboard included. This 60% keycaps set fit most standard US Layout 61 68 60% mx switches mechanical keyboards. But different brands maybe have different layout, so some keys may have different sizes. If you are not sure about the keycaps size of your keyboard, you can confirm with us.
Description:
→ The main material of this keycap set is PBT;   → The height is Semi profile,the thickness is about 1.5mm;   → This 60% keyset fit most Standard US layout 61 68 60% mx switches mechanical keyboards.
61 Keycaps Size and Height(First layer):
→ Tab: 1.5u, R3;   → Caps Lock: 1.75u, R2;   → Left Shift: 2.25u, R1;   → Ctrl,Win,Alt,Menu: 1.25u, R1;   → Spacebar: 6.25u, R1;   → Right Shift: 2.75u, R1;   → Enter: 2.25u, R2;   → Backspace: 2u, R4;   → Vertical line: 1.5u, R3;   → The size of other letters are 1u, the height of the letter is the same as the first keycap in the row of the letter .
16 Keycaps Size and Height(Second layer):
→ Right Shift: 1.75u, R1;   → Ctrl,Fn,Alt: 1u, R1;   → PgDn: 1u, R1;   → PgUp: 1u, R2;   → Del: 1u, R3;   → ~: 1u, R4;
If some keycaps are broken or missing when you receive the keyset, you can tell us , we will send these keycaps to you in time.

reviews.title: As expected
reviews.text: I was a bit wary because it's dye sub but the printing was perfect and came in exactly 2 weeks from China. Definitely better than the Akko EVA especially since the color on the Akko's are very noticeably lighter then pictures. I returned them the next day

title: VELOCIFIRE Tenkeyless Mechanical Keyboard Mini, 78-Key Compact Ergonomic, Outemu Brown Switches Backlit and Double-Shot ABS Keycaps for Copywriter, Typist and Programmer
features: MUST HAVE- Velocifire mechanical keyboard is designed for copywriter, programmer, editors who spend many hours typing every day. You will get better at typing speed and accuracy through Velocifire mechanical keyboards.

Durable Brown Switch- Low-noise switches have a tactile bump for feedback with every key-press. It is much QUIETER than Blue Switch but LOUDER than a regular Membrane keyboard. If you never used a mechanical keyboard before, please think about whether you can accept its sound first.

Compact Design- The compact mechanical keyboard helps save desktop space.Tiny size of compact keyboard makes it possible to share room with a mouse. Users like to have to mouse close to keyboard, since that will be easier to reach.It also serves as a accessory of laptop.

ANTI-GHOSTING - This is sometime used in place of Key Rollover, but the terminology is incorrect since ghosting is a different (and rare) issue. You will need to do more research to see what key rollover technology is being used. Ghosting is when two or more keys are pressed and a key that was not pressed registers instead.
Money Back -- Velocifire offers a 30 days money back. We always serve you after the sale!

reviews.title: The way to go
reviews.text: My son needed it in the worst way 4 his failing laptop. It's been excellent in every way... gaming, etc. He loves it. Truly a lifesaver.

reviews.title: Good keyboard
reviews.text: It's good for the price until you can afford something better.

reviews.title: ok
reviews.text: ok

reviews.title: Huge bargain, but the layout is not right
reviews.text:
This keyboard is a huge bargain, but the layout is not right. The bottom third and fourth rows don't match what you'd expect from a keyboard.

If you don't touch-type, then this keyboard is great. If you do, it's not so great.

reviews.title: Sounds horrendous
reviews.text: So I should start off to say the build quality is good and the switches are nice. My complaint is the noise that is made when bottoming the keys out on the aluminum top. It makes a loud and high pitched ringing noise that is far from pleasant. The small form factor would make it great for gaming however the sound when hitting the keys are is not good. Ultimately it could have been a nice keyboard but it fell short.

title: YMDK GH60 GK61 RGB Hot Swap Independent Driver Tyce-C ANSI Mechanical Keyboard DIY kit Plastic Case CNC Aluminum Case Plate PCB (CNC Alu Cyan)
description: Package Included Case + Feet + Screws + GK61 Hot Swap PCB + Alu Silver Plate + USB Cable + Switch Removal Tool ​ Details The alu keyboard case is made of CNC aluminum sand Blast and then anodized.The plastic case is ABS amoulded. The chipset is MCU 32 bit,8M Flash,3 pcs 256*256*256 RGB drive to support full 16.8 million RGB. PCB has RGB presoldered,it's under per switch.PCB RGB can support by music. There is no switches in the kit,you can order Cherry Gateron Kailh SMD Box switches etc yourself.Just put in switches in is ok,no need soldering again. PCB is programmable with the software GK6x Plus,can download in official sitejikedingzhi dot com
features: Package Included:Case + Feet + Screws + GK61 Hot Swap PCB + Alu Plate + USB Cable + Switch Removal Tool
Pls note:The PCB is fully programmable with GK software,the Fn key is the last key at the bottom and can't change place.

PCB has RGB presoldered,it's under per switch.PCB RGB can support by music.

reviews.title: Great pre-solder build. Comes with two cherry mx blacks and the Bluetooth is tricky.
reviews.text: Very good build quality overall. It came with two cherry mx black switches for the space bar and the right control keys which is a huge bonus. I purchased the Bluetooth white pcb which is very well built but the Bluetooth is very tricky. I have not been able to set it up yet even when I try to do the “fn+zxc” keys to setup for pairing it doesn’t work. Other than that it was a great purchase for the price and I will eventually figure out the Bluetooth.

reviews.title: Awesome first kit
reviews.text: First I want to state why I removed 1 star. I was missing 2 tiny screws that are easy to replace. However, the seller was very quick to reply and gave me all the details I needed to replace it. They even offered to fix the issue for me. But I am ok doing it myself. This is my first board build and I used Kahil Box Navy blues. The board feels amazing and well put together. Great first kit to get started. Can't wait to build my next board and get some more parts to form YMDK. I would choose the faster shipping if you are like me and hate waiting. I did get the board quicker than the projected date.

reviews.title: Great Kit for the money.
reviews.text:
this is a really great for the money. fit and finish is really pretty good, not great, but real good. the overall design is great, and the implementation is good. the clip in stabilizers are "lacking" but thats not a serious knock on the kit.

It is a good kit for the money for sure.

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.text:
Worked out for the kids.
They liked it .

reviews.title: EASY TO MOD BAREBONES KIT
reviews.text:
Amazing little 60% board to mod.

I bought some switches, and installed them no problem.

Stabilizers are not pre lubed

Mods listed below

1.Tape mod on bottom of PCB
2.pennies on the bottom of the inside of the case
3.EVA foam inside case

Sounds amazing with lubed switches.

reviews.title: Solid
reviews.text: This keyboard and mouse set is solid.  They have a durable aluminum body.  The keys are mechanical in look, but press easy without any noise.  The colors are nice and shine through the keys so you can see which letter it is in the dark.  It gives off just the right amount of light.  They look slick together on a desk and operate well.  Great little set.

reviews.title: Solid
reviews.text: This keyboard and mouse set is solid.  They have a durable aluminum body.  The keys are mechanical in look, but press easy without any noise.  The colors are nice and shine through the keys so you can see which letter it is in the dark.  It gives off just the right amount of light.  They look slick together on a desk and operate well.  Great little set.

reviews.title: Nice keyboard!!
reviews.text:
Updated review.. The mouse quit working after about 12 hours of use. This is disappointing because when it worked it was nice and responsive and was comfortable. When I left the original review everything worked fine..

This keyboard looks and works good. The back lighting makes it easy to see in the dark and the keys are precise and feel good while typing. The real aluminum frame is sturdy and looks good too. The phone holder is a nice touch. I would say it's worth it for the price.

reviews.title: Nice manual keyboard with a lighter touch.
reviews.text:
This review is for the Pwnage Ultra Custom Mechanical Keyboard: Gateron Optical Switches.

The Package was delivered quickly in perfect condition. In the box was the full-size white keyboard, detachable USB cord, keycap remover, and manual.

Setup was plug and play, no additional drivers needed for Windows 11. The keyboard replaced my 105 key Cherry Blue switch manual black keyboard... which has worked very well with just basic cleaning for 5 years. Compared to my old keyboard this keyboard adds multi color, and some very intense graphics, should you choose to use them... I see videos already posted for this product cycling thru the graphics available so I will just show pictures of the static color I have chosen.

The Red Optical/Manual switches on this keyboard are a little quieter than the blue cherry switches I am used to – but they are by no means quiet…it definitely has the tap, tap, tap sound inherent in all manual keyboards The press seems very easy... much lighter and easier than the blue manual switches I am used to. And so far, I think I prefer the red optical/manual switches on this keyboard. Of course, typing is very subjective to taste and your mileage may vary.

Overall, I can honestly say that I approve of this keyboard, and will keep this one as my everyday keyboard, unless, of course my wife steals it for her home office workstation… she has after all been eyeballing it.

reviews.title: Overall an excellent full size keyboard
reviews.text:
Unboxing was fun. Nicely packaged. Keyboard is nice and large, a little too large for my tastes coming from someone who uses a 65%. But good for every day use and office use with a little side of gaming in the evening. Switches are nice and the RGb effects are plentiful. I think being able to switch the plates easily for those who want a quick easy solution to being able to completely change their keyboard without having to spend the time and money to build a completely custom one one.

Definitely a great full size.

reviews.title: Gaming all the way, I could not use this for extended typing... loudness lol
reviews.text:
This keyboard is very well made, has good heft and stability to it. The keyboard includes a braded USB-C and a key cap remover tool. The keys feel really good when gaming, the input is instantaneous and the feel and travel is really smooth. The only downside for me it is that it is very loud. I use this when my wife is around and she is immediately annoyed, lol, so I only use it when I game on my own. That being said, this is my favorite keyboard. I love all the RGB patterns, (check video). I love the feel of the keys, when I game I feel that is just the right travel distance and feel for my taste. The rear pop out legs help me put this bad boy at the right angle. The finish is really even and dark, the keys are not your typical white on black, it is more of a clear or light grey, this makes the contrast a little harder to see what key is what, so if you don't type well and need to reference the keyboard visually it might be a harder to see. All in all this is a very good entry level keyboard and it is very budget friendly.

+ RGB Great patterns
+ Hefty and stable
+ Silky smooth keys
+ USB-C braded cable
+ Mac / Win compatible
+ Black finish is matte and clean
- Loud Keys

Hope this was helpful!

reviews.title: Beautiful Keyboard
reviews.text:
I was first impressed with this keyboard by the packaging. The flap that secures the box top it held closed by magnets. Unique and impressive.

As to the keyboard, it is beautifully white and has top-of-the-line red key actuators. With these you get a definite "click" when you hit the keys informing you the character has been chosen. The keytops supplied are also all white and they supply a keytop pulling tool, obviously expecting you to switch out some of the keytops to suit your taste, making this superior quality unit fully customized to your taste.

A premium keyboard for those who appreciate true quality in a computer input instrument.

reviews.title: Great and beautiful keyboard
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:784296779c5343262f2f9394390eabd8]] First of all, the packaging box of this keyboard caught my eye. The box was attracted by magnets, which is novelty for me. The keyboard is beautiful, I like the white keyboard because it looks very clean, and there are many kinds of RGB lights, which means that we have many options. It is very comfortable to press the keys and has a good sense of hitting. Meanwhile, the keyboard is a little louder for me. I don't feel it when I play games, but I feel a little noisy when I work, and I'm afraid it will disturb my roommates because our desktops are in the same room, but the sound is within the acceptable range. Overall, I am satisfied with this beautiful and useful keyboard.

title: Kraken Coiled Keyboard Cable - Artisan Coiled USB C Cable with Aviator Connector for Mechanical Gaming Keyboards (Pure White)
features: Premium Artisan Designs in colors to fit every gaming setup!
Heavy Duty 5 Pin Aviator Connector (Easy to connect, and looks AMAZING)
Double Sleeved for enhanced looks and durability!
5 Feet long to reach your keyboard anywhere in your setup

reviews.title: Excellent quality cable and connectors, but color is more purple than blue
reviews.text:
Update: Oddly enough, this did not work with a Drop Alt keyboard. It worked with a few other keyboards just fine though. Just a word of warning for anyone pairing this cable with a Drop Alt (or maybe any other Drop keyboard).

This is the third coiled cable I have ordered, and it's definitely the best quality overall. The cable itself is thick and good quality. The coil is a bit firm, but nothing too unusual. The intermediate connector is all metal and heavy. Both sides of the intermediate connector can be unthreaded: The side going to the USB-C connector, and the side going to the USB connector.

One interesting thing I noticed was that the end connectors have a color matched almost shrink wrap thickness strain protection around them. The USB side is the most noticeable, and the USB-C side is a bit thicker. As long as there is enough strain protection, I actually prefer the less bulky end connections.

The only nit is the color. Even though it looked dark purplish in the product listing, I was hoping that it would be more blue in real life. It's not, it's an attractive dark purple. I would assume the color represented in the product listing is accurate, in case you're wondering if there is any color variation from the listing photos to real life.

【Cherry Profile Keycaps】-Designed with the popular Cherry profile, this keycaps set can work as the most basic and comfortable set.
【PBT & DYE SUBLIMATION】-Compared with ABS, PBT has better high hardness, wear resistance and high temperature resistance. Dye Sublimation makes the font of keycaps clear and non-fade
【Switch Compatibility】-Standardized MX compatible with most MX switches. e.g. Cherry MX switches and clones including Gateron, Halo, and Kaihua
【What You Get】-1x140 thick PBT Keycap set (key puller included). It’s only keycaps, no keyboard included

If you use a keyboard 8 hours a day, make it count. Use a keyboard that you enjoy.
The Code keyboard is one of my favorites. The clear switches make it so you have a great feel - but don’t annoy your coworkers.

reviews.title: !!!!!Great PCB!!!!!!!!
reviews.text:
Used this for my Switch Couture Electrotype60 amazing PCB and pretty easy to solder, especially for an amateur solderer like me, definitely will be buying another one when I have another case to build. Fit perfectly, No problems soldering, and definitely came out perfect out of the box, though I don't know how to brighten up the LED nor change the modes, I'm completely fine with the RGB cycle. I'm Typing on my new keyboard as we speak and it works perfectly, no delays, no nothing, just perfect!!!!

(I can admit I'm kinda too last to do VIA so I'm just working with it lol)

title: DROP + Invyr Holy Panda Mechanical Keyboard Switches - Plate Mounted Tactile Switches, Cherry MX Style, 67g Spring, by Kailh (70 PCS)
features: THE MOST TACTILE SWITCHES IN THE WORLD: With a name like Holy Panda, these switches had to be epic. Made with stems from Halo switches, housing found on Invyr Panda switches, Holy Panda switches combine the best of both worlds.
THE BEST OF BOTH WORLDS: The result is a snappy, tactile switch that is satisfying to type on.

COMPATIBILITY: Holy Panda switches are compatible with plate-mounted Cherry-style PCB's and are perfect for hot-swap compatible barebones kits such as the Drop ALT, CTRL, SHIFT, ENTR, Carina, Planck, and Preonic.
SPECS: Halo Switch Stems, Polycarbonate top housing, Nylon bottom housing, 67g spring, Plate Mount, and MX-compatible.

reviews.title: Excellent tactile
reviews.text:
I have purchased these, lubed Glorious Panda, and Tecsee Purple panda.

This is the best with the other 2 being very close to as good as this. The tactile-ness is a little better than the other both. With the other 2, the tactile is right at the beginning, while this one starts at the beginning and seems to feel the same until bottoming out. All have the nice bump back.

I didn't lube these and they sound and feel great. I think this is my favorite tactile now. But if you're on budget, I would recommend one of the others.

reviews.title: Not a bad one in the bunch
reviews.text: Got the 90 pack and not a broken or bent pin in the entire bunch. Professionally packed and working 100 percent. All switches tested and working fine. A little expensive but worth it for the fast Amazon delivery.

title: Akko Keycaps Set, Black&Bronze Theme 158-Key ASA Profile PBT Double-Shot Keycap Set with Black Keycaps for Mechanical Keyboards with Collection Box
features: BLACK&BRONZE THEME – The combination with classic black, gray and dark bronze,　the Black&Bronze keycaps brings heavy sense of history. The bronze charactors shine on the dark keycaps let us fantasy the bronze gleams in the dark night through thick fog.

ULTIMATE CUSTOMIZATION FLEXIBILITY – Comes with Akko ASA profile, the 158-key keycap set is suitable for a variety of layouts including but not limited to 61-key(60%), 68-key (65%), 84-key (75%), 87-key (TKL), 98-Key (Classic 1800), 100-Key (96%) and full 108-key size, and thus offers strong flexibility for keyboard personalization.
PBT DOUBLE-SHOT – Double-shot keycaps are extremely durable and resistant to wear even for decades, and the legends are particularly vibrant, sharp with high contrast.

ASA PROFILE – Akko’s proprietary ASA profile is tailored to offer a more familiar and comfortable typing experience by matching the height for OEM profile while maintaining the aesthetics and spheric top of the classic SA profile.

FOR MX STRUCTURE SWITCHES – Compatible with MX structure switches including but not limited to Cherry, Gateron, Akko and Kailh etc. Large keys of non-standard layout & stabilizers may not be compatible.

reviews.title: Some of the best keycaps under $100
reviews.text:
These keycaps are fantastic. The quality of material is noticeable right when you open the package, and the layout compatibility is uncomparable. For about $60 you get keycaps that work with the following layouts:

Full Size
1800
96%
75%
65%
60%
40% (non ortholinear)

The only layouts that aren't supported are ortholinear (though you might be able to make something work) and split (no split spacebar here). 60% with arrows (the 64-key) also is not supported as there is no 2u shift.

The colors are fantastic, the material feels very nice, and the cap profile is just incredibly comfortable to type on. In fact, it's so comfortable the only caps that I think are nicer are Drop's MT3 which cost double and don't come with as much layout variation without buying extra kits.

This specific set, Dracula's Castle, also comes with custom novelites and two different colors worth of compatibility (crimson and black) for a lot of the keys to make your board look exactly the way you want.

I'd highly recommend anything in ASA profile. The Cherry profile is good too, but not s comfortable for me to type on personally.

reviews.title: So amazing for the price
reviews.text: They looks so good for the price, Akko does it again!

reviews.title: Great quality double shot pbt keycaps.
Pretty Great Set with an Interesting Profile
reviews.text: This set is pretty nice, unlike most of Akko's keycap sets this set doesn't directly rip off color ways from existing GMK or EBPT sets, it comes close to something like SA Bliss but it adds black mods so it's not exactly the same.  The keycaps themselves are fairly nice and the font of the legends are a lot more consistent than their cherry profile sets. The packing is nice albeit a little frustrating as you pretty much need to use a keycap puller to remove the keycaps. The ASA profile is what I found the most interesting, if I had to compare it to anything I would actually compare it to OEM profile but slightly taller with rounded edges than something SA profile, The sculpting is a lot more derivative of OEM than SA in my opinion. The typing feel is pretty great it is very reminiscent of OEM profile so if you are used to OEM profile you will be right at home. The sound is more clacky than thocky at least in my NK65 with Gateron Cap Gold Switches. Overall the keycaps are nice and the ASA profile is a pleasant surprise coming from someone that uses both SA and OEM profile fairly regularly.

reviews.title: Good quality, Vivid colors, Nice sounding, Great value
reviews.text:
Akko Los Angeles 158-Key ASA Profile PBT Double-Shot Full Keycap Set for Mechanical Keyboards with Collection Box

I really love the profile of these keycaps. I have a hard time with whether to call this company a knock off company or not. They do have their own color combos and make combos that other companies do for a lot cheaper. Are color combos and fonts really proprietary? I'm not sure and eventually there will be no more combination of colors that one company will be able to claim as only their colors. I do think that Akko make really good keycaps and you get a lot for your money. So that's my two cents.

reviews.title: Great set
reviews.text: Bought these for a budget build, my set was perfect. Quality exceeded expectations.

reviews.title: Spectacular!
reviews.text:
all i have to say is, get these keycaps. i was truly surprised at the quality of these keycaps. they feel really nice, solid, and with a little grain on the top that are very comfortable. Pricewise i think these are right on. At about $50 the quality is really good without the wait and the much higher prices of some other premium ABS...the colorway is one that i really like. I have always had a handful of colorways i wanted, the botonical, these Hammerhead, modern dolch, etc. the legends are pretty consistent with a few fonts thinner than others but i count 2 keys in my 60% board. not bad and i don't really notice it. i really like the color scheme more than i would notice the font issues.

Now i only wish i would have have a bigger board, 75% or TKL to take advantage of the other keys. geez keyboard world you will bankrupt me.

Very beautiful set. i'm coming back to my 60% for a little while.

reviews.title: Lovely colors, plenty of options!
reviews.text: Key caps look really great. Tons of combinations of caps for just about every layout. I threw it on an old WYSE WY-60 keyboard and it had some uncommon unit sizes for a few keys. Worked out great after finding keycaps that fit its spot. I had to grind down the edges of a few keys to fit them nicely. A modern keyboard will have no compatibility issues without a doubt!

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Although it was pricey I loved the color scheme and wanted it. It has extra bits like longer or shorter space bar and ctrl, alt keys in case your board needs them.

reviews.title: Quality keycaps
reviews.text:
Well built and produced keycaps. This keyboard includes keys for Aifei, not sure if they are the ones who made these keycaps or the ones they are cloning.

Very nice and bright colors, font looks great.

Though this set seems to have a bit of lower profile and standard keycaps. So just a heads up on that.

Overall I am happy with these Keycaps.

reviews.title: Looks Good, Feels Good
reviews.text: I bought these as an alternative to replacing the whole keyboard. I have an old Das Keyboard with blank keys and cherry blue switches. With these keycaps and dampner rings these keys feel really nice. Everything fit except the space bar, which is pretty good for something thing not custom to my keyboard brand. The keycap puller has thin arms to get between the keys easily, which was nice because the one I got with the dampners was too thick. By swapping these keys out I feel like I saved myself $100 since I didn't buy a whole new keyboard.

reviews.title: Great value fast shipping!
reviews.text: Corsair k68 all keys worked cept Windows key and space bar. Oh well overall everything great!

reviews.title: Better then the ones that came on my keyboard
reviews.text: I use my computer everyday so I wanted my keyboard to look a little better and these definitely did the job. Overall you won't be disappointed and the quality is good dosen't feel cheaply made

reviews.title: Excellent, thick keycaps, amazing value for the money
reviews.text: I was a little hesitant to buy these keycaps because they seemed too good to be true for the price, but sometimes you take a risk and it pays off! These keys are very nicely thick and have a good texture to them, and the side printing looks good.

reviews.title: Nice, inexpensive keycaps.
reviews.text: I bought these keycaps to refresh an older mech that I'd worn the keys down to smooth nubs. Didn't expect too much for this price. They came packaged neatly, all fit quite well, and feel good under the fingers. They're a little thicker than my stock keycaps, and I had no problems like others mentioned with the spacebar. The side printing is nice for those that don't touch type, but would still like the look of a blank keyboard. I may pick up another set of these for my home keyboard.

title: Gaming Keyboard and Mouse Combo, MageGee GK770 RGB Backlit Wired Gaming Keyboard with Multimedia Keys, Ergonomic Wrist Rest Computer Keyboard, 3200 DPI Gaming Mouse for Windows PC Gamers
features: ✅GAMING KEYBOARD & MOUSE: A standard 104 keys layout plus 10 multimedia function keys (total 114 keys), gives faster response and better tactile feedback. Accurate, comfortable, soft touch with anti-ghosting functionality. RGB backlit effect provides a unique visual experience, taking you into a pretty cool gaming atmosphere. Ergonomic wrist rest offers enough support and protection to your hands, and reduce hand fatigue caused by long-term use.

✅10 MULTIMEDIA KEYS & 25 NON-CONFLICT KEYS: 10 independent multimedia keys at the top of the keyboard makes it quick access to music player, email, computer, calculator without interrupting your game. 25 anti-ghosting keys allow you to press or hold multiple keys simultaneously, helping you win in the fierce game without being bound by speed. Adjustable rear feet and non-slip pads provide comfortable typing experience.

✅RGB LED BACKLIGHT KEYBOARD: The keyboard has RGB light settings with multiple modes (dynamic backlit or solid static light) to choose from, making it shining and sparkling in the dark, easy to find the correct keys and reduce error rate. You can adjust backlight brightness and speed according to personal preference. The backlight also can be turned off / on by pressing Fn + Page Down.

✅ADJUSTABLE DPI GAMING MOUSE: 7 colors LED breathing backlit ( blue, yellow, green, white, purple, red, cyan), 4 adjustable DPI - 600/800/1200/1600/2400/3200 to match the mouse speed instantly for different game scenarios. Advanced gaming optical sensor ensures accurate positioning and stable transmission. Pressing the DPI button for 3 seconds can turn off the mouse backlight. Contoured shape fits your hands perfectly, comfortable to use.

✅WIDE COMPATIBILITY: The USB wired keyboard and mouse combo is simple to use, just plug and play, no need for additional driver or software. Works well with Win2000, Win XP, WinME, Vista, Win7, Win8, Android, linux, Mac and other operating systems. Suitable for gaming beginners or lovers.

reviews.title: nice but mouse dont work
reviews.text: it was pretty and bright but the mouse didn't work with my pc.

reviews.title: Complete JUNK----Don't waste your money
reviews.text: Button's Stick very bad mouse makes your characters run where ever they want too it only last a few months then its garbage

reviews.title: Beautiful
reviews.text: This is the most adorable keyboard. I love it for work and for gaming. It has a lovely feel to it and the colors are great! The only thing that i would change is the sound of the keys when you are typing as it is sort of loud. Sometimes when I am typing really fast I can not hear the other person on the phone speak.

reviews.title: Birthday gift
reviews.text: I got this to go with my sons new desktop that he got for his 10th birthday.  He absolutely loves it and has yet to have any issues.  Well worth the purchase.

reviews.title: stopped working after a few months
reviews.text: love the keyboard, only reason for the bad review is that the mouse stopped working less than 6 months after i bought it, tried to get a hold of them but they dont have any sort of contact so now i have to get a new mouse
